  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Strengthening research writing centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap statement, and contribution claim; the current framing buries the key innovation and undersells the parameter-efficiency angle.",
    "R1.4": "'Make this stronger' in an academic context frequently means amplifying the novelty signal — the artifact's comparisons are only against GraphFlow-v1 (the authors' own prior work), leaving the broader delta vs. the field unestablished.",
    "R1.6": "Prose-level strengthening is a plausible primary interpretation: the text is verbose, hedged ('We expect', 'We believe'), and repeats the 30–40% figure without narrative payoff, all of which are writing-polish targets."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should I strengthen this by (A) improving the prose quality, rhetorical impact, and sentence-level clarity, or by (B) reframing and sharpening the contribution and novelty claims to better establish what GraphFlow achieves beyond the broader GNN literature?"
}

rationale.R1.1: Strengthening research writing centrally involves sharpening the thesis, gap statement, and contribution claim; the current framing buries the key innovation and undersells the parameter-efficiency angle.
rationale.R1.4: 'Make this stronger' in an academic context frequently means amplifying the novelty signal — the artifact's comparisons are only against GraphFlow-v1 (the authors' own prior work), leaving the broader delta vs. the field unestablished.
rationale.R1.6: Prose-level strengthening is a plausible primary interpretation: the text is verbose, hedged ('We expect', 'We believe'), and repeats the 30–40% figure without narrative payoff, all of which are writing-polish targets.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I strengthen this by (A) improving the prose quality, rhetorical impact, and sentence-level clarity, or by (B) reframing and sharpening the contribution and novelty claims to better establish what GraphFlow achieves beyond the broader GNN literature?
